name: 1 - One
funFact: One is the loneliest number - but also the first!

name: 2 - Two
funFact: Two eyes two ears two hands - we have pairs!

name: 3 - Three
funFact: Three is a magic number in many stories!

name: 4 - Four
funFact: Four seasons: spring summer fall and winter!

name: 5 - Five
funFact: You have five fingers on each hand!

name: 9 - Nine
funFact: Cats are said to have nine lives!

name: 11 - Eleven
funFact: Eleven is the first double-digit prime number!

name: 17 - Seventeen
funFact: Seventeen is a lucky prime number!

name: 19 - Nineteen
funFact: Nineteen is the last teen number!

name: 0 - Zero
funFact: Zero means nothing but is very important!

name: 100 - Hundred
funFact: One hundred pennies make one dollar!
